center.name: 西米沙鄢
center.summary: 西米沙鄢是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括棕尾斑嘴犀鳥、Visayan cuckooshrike、Visayan tailorbird等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also occurs in the proposed Central Panay Mountain Range Park which contains the largest block of remaining forest in the Western Visayas, and the tourist destination of Twin Lakes (Mount Talinis)

birds.evidence: It is native to the Philippines in Western Visayas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Visayan hornbill (Penelopides panini) is a hornbill found in tropical moist lowland forests of the Philippines in the Western Visayas region which includes the islands of Panay, Negros and formerly as well as the island of Masbate, and formerly Ticao, in the Philippines
